creator: dcarmich@mcs.com
text:
kdehelp from stock kdebase-1.0 package doesn't work (complains about
	not having an __ftok symbol)

Fix: 

I recompiled the kdebase-1.0 sources to be linked against libcompat,
	but the port maintainer should change the Makefiles or port files
	to have it be linked against libcompat.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install kdebase-1.0 package and try to use kdehelp.
